title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 71.330 - Term maintenance defined
text:
71.330.  Term maintenance defined. — The term "maintenance", as used in sections 71.310 and 71.320, shall include light, water, heat, fuel, power, ice and the wages of janitors, armorers and other employees necessary for such armories, drill halls and headquarters.
(RSMo 1939 § 7366) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7215; 1919 § 8654; 1909 § 9542
